allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['uri']\) for r in data.get\('results',[]\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(dep.get\('group',''\),dep.get\('module',''\),dep.get\('version',{}\).get\('requires',''\)\) for v in d.get\('variants',[]\) for dep in v.get\('dependencies',[]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; releases=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['tag_name'], [a['name'] for a in r.get\('assets',[]\)]\) for r in releases[:3]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(a['name'], a['browser_download_url']\) for a in r.get\('assets',[]\)]")
Bash(python -c " import sys, json releases = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for r in releases[:5]: print\(r['tag_name']\) for a in r.get\('assets', []\): print\(' ', a['name'], a['browser_download_url']\) ")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['uri']\) for r in d.get\('results',[]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; repos=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r.get\('key',''\)\) for r in repos]")

Bash(python -c " import sys, json versions = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for v in versions[:3]: print\(v['version_number'], v['version_type']\) for f in v.get\('files', []\): print\(' ', f['filename'], f['url']\) ")
Bash(python -c " import sys, json versions = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for v in versions[:5]: print\(v['version_number'], v['loaders'], v['version_type']\) ")
